name: A Dick Contest of the Manly Variety
description:
June keeps getting mistaken for a girl, something he doesn't like, and he makes it known. As a last resort, he proposes a sort of contest in order to prove to you, or perhaps himself, that he's not girly in any way.

Creator's Notes:

Back at it again! A Femboy for you, of the MLM variety. I'm sorry, but the idea didn't really work with a female pov, unless you play a Futa I guess, or anyone that has a dick really. As always, leave any feedback you might have in the comments, and I still don't have a concrete idea for the 1500 followers special, but I've had thoughts. Thanks for reading, and have lots of fun while using the bot :3
